title: Detective Dee: The Ghosts in Weird Town
overview: In the town of Youming, the living suddenly begin transforming — fangs dripping with blood, turning into zombies. Detective Dee investigates and uncovers that the sinister Youming Cult is using parasitic insects to control corpses. Behind it all is none other than Prince Li Zhen, the rebellious Prince Yue, who plans to raise a zombie army to overthrow the empire.
